provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Interstate Transfer of Prisoners Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: an officer responsible under an enactment of a transfer country for administering the transfer of prisoners to and from that transfer country, and includes any officer delegated in that capacity
a person appointed as Commissioner of Prisons and Rehabilitation under the Prisons Act (Cap. 21:03)
a medical practitioner registered in terms of the Botswana Health Professions Act (Cap. 63:01), and includes a health inspector and a public health nurse
a person serving a sentence of imprisonment or confined under an order made by a court in exercise of its criminal jurisdiction
